info.title: Prisoner to NOMIS update API
info.description: Handles HMPPS domain events for NOMIS updates

put.summary: Resynchronises an appearance for an appearance from DPS to NOMIS
put.description: Used when an appearance with an existing mapping needs resynchronising to nomis, so emergency use only. Mappings should all exist. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

parameters.name: courtCaseId
parameters.description: The DPS ID of the related court case

schema.description: The DPS ID of the related court case

parameters.name: appearanceId
parameters.description: The DPS ID of the appearance to be resynchronised

schema.description: The DPS ID of the appearance to be resynchronised

put.summary: Resynchronises a sentence from DPS to NOMIS
put.description: Used when a sentence with an existing mapping needs resynchronising to nomis, so emergency use only. Mappings should all exist. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

parameters.name: courtCaseId
parameters.description: The DPS ID of the related court case

schema.description: The DPS ID of the related court case

parameters.name: appearanceId
parameters.description: The DPS ID of the related appearance

schema.description: The DPS ID of the related appearance

parameters.name: sentenceId
parameters.description: The DPS ID of the sentence to be re-synced to NOMIS

schema.description: The DPS ID of the sentence to be re-synced to NOMIS

404.description: Either mapping found for case/appearance/sentence or case/appearance/sentence not found in DPS

post.summary: Resynchronises a sentence insert from DPS to NOMIS
post.description: Used when a sentence insert needs resynchronising to NOMIS which failed previously, so emergency use only. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

parameters.name: courtCaseId
parameters.description: The DPS ID of the related court case

schema.description: The DPS ID of the related court case

parameters.name: appearanceId
parameters.description: The DPS ID of the related appearance

schema.description: The DPS ID of the related appearance

parameters.name: sentenceId
parameters.description: The DPS ID of the sentence to be re-synced to NOMIS

schema.description: The DPS ID of the sentence to be re-synced to NOMIS

404.description: Either mapping found for case/appearance or case/appearance/sentence not found in DPS

put.summary: Resynchronises a sentence term from DPS to NOMIS
put.description: Used when a sentence term with an existing mapping needs an update resynchronising to nomis, so emergency use only. Mappings should all exist. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

parameters.name: courtCaseId
parameters.description: The DPS ID of the related court case

schema.description: The DPS ID of the related court case

parameters.name: appearanceId
parameters.description: The DPS ID of the related appearance

schema.description: The DPS ID of the related appearance

parameters.name: sentenceId
parameters.description: The DPS ID of the related sentence

schema.description: The DPS ID of the related sentence

parameters.name: periodLengthId
parameters.description: The DPS ID of the related term to be re-synced to NOMIS

schema.description: The DPS ID of the related term to be re-synced to NOMIS

404.description: Either mapping found for case/appearance/sentence/term or case/appearance/sentence/term not found in DPS

post.summary: Resynchronises a sentence term insert from DPS to NOMIS
post.description: Used when a sentence term insert needs resynchronising to NOMIS which failed previously, so emergency use only. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

parameters.name: courtCaseId
parameters.description: The DPS ID of the related court case

schema.description: The DPS ID of the related court case

parameters.name: appearanceId
parameters.description: The DPS ID of the related appearance

schema.description: The DPS ID of the related appearance

parameters.name: sentenceId
parameters.description: The DPS ID of the related sentence

schema.description: The DPS ID of the related sentence

parameters.name: periodLengthId
parameters.description: The DPS ID of the term to be re-synced to NOMIS

schema.description: The DPS ID of the term to be re-synced to NOMIS

404.description: Either mapping found for case or sentence, or term not found in DPS

put.summary: Resynchronises a charge for an appearance from DPS to NOMIS
put.description: Used when a charge with an existing mapping needs resynchronising to nomis, so emergency use only. Mappings should all exist. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

parameters.name: courtCaseId
parameters.description: The DPS ID of the related court case

schema.description: The DPS ID of the related court case

parameters.name: appearanceId
parameters.description: The DPS ID of the related appearance

schema.description: The DPS ID of the related appearance

parameters.name: chargeId
parameters.description: The DPS ID of the charge to be re-synced to NOMIS

schema.description: The DPS ID of the charge to be re-synced to NOMIS

404.description: Either mapping not found for case/appearance/charge or case/appearance/sentence not found in DPS

post.summary: Resynchronises a charge insert from DPS to NOMIS
post.description: Used when a charge insert needs resynchronising to NOMIS which failed previously or was erroneously deleted, so emergency use only. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

parameters.name: courtCaseId
parameters.description: The DPS ID of the related court case

schema.description: The DPS ID of the related court case

parameters.name: appearanceId
parameters.description: The DPS ID of the related appearance

schema.description: The DPS ID of the related appearance

parameters.name: chargeId
parameters.description: The DPS ID of the charge to be re-synced to NOMIS

schema.description: The DPS ID of the charge to be re-synced to NOMIS

404.description: Either mapping found for case/appearance or case/appearance/charge not found in DPS

put.summary: Updates a visit in NOMIS from the visit in DPS, will create or update visitors as required
put.description: Used when an unexpected event has happened in DPS that has resulted in the NOMIS data drifting from DPS, so emergency use only. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__SYNCHRONISATION__RW

403.description: Forbidden to access this endpoint. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__SYNCHRONISATION__RW

post.summary: Create a visit in NOMIS from the visit in DPS
post.description: Used when an unexpected event has happened in DPS that has resulted in the NOMIS data drifting from DPS, so emergency use only. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__SYNCHRONISATION__RW

403.description: Forbidden to access this endpoint. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__SYNCHRONISATION__RW

put.summary: Synchronises a DPS Location TO Nomis
put.description: A manual method for synchronising a DPS Location. In other words it repairs the location by updating or creating it in Nomis depending on whether a mapping exists. Requires role PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

404.description: The DPS id was not found

put.description: An endpoint to synchronise a court schedule. The recreate query parameter is passed onto nomis-prisoner-api to tell it to recreate using the eventId from the existing mapping. This is to recover from court schedules deleted by remand and sentencing. Requires role PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

parameters.name: prisonerNumber
parameters.description: Prisoner number

schema.description: Prisoner number

parameters.name: dpsCourtAppearanceId
parameters.description: DPS court appearance Id

schema.description: DPS court appearance Id

parameters.name: recreate
parameters.description: Whether to recreate a deleted court schedule with the existing mapping eventId

schema.description: Whether to recreate a deleted court schedule with the existing mapping eventId

put.summary: Update prisoner contact aka contact data from DPS back to NOMIS. This will update the prisoner contact
put.description: Used when an unexpected event has happened in DPS, for instance no domain events published after a prisoner contact that has resulted in the NOMIS data drifting from DPS, so emergency use only. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__SYNCHRONISATION__RW

post.summary: Creates prisoner contact aka contact data from DPS back to NOMIS. This will create the prisoner contact
post.description: Used when an unexpected event has happened in DPS, for instance no domain events published after a prisoner contact that has resulted in the NOMIS data drifting from DPS, so emergency use only. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__SYNCHRONISATION__RW

put.summary: Synchronises a profile detail to NOMIS
put.description: Manually synchronises a profile detail to NOMIS. This is intended for use by developers to recover from errors. Requires role PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__SYNCHRONISATION__RW

put.summary: Resynchronises a case note for the given prisoner from DPS to NOMIS
put.description: Copies a case note from DPS to NOMIS. Used when an unexpected event has happened in DPS that has resulted in the NOMIS data drifting from DPS, so emergency use only. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

A manual method for synchronising a DPS Attendance to Nomis (whether new or not - performs an upsert). Performs in the same way as the automated message based solution - intended for use as a workaround when things go wrong. Requires role PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

parameters.name: attendanceId
parameters.description: DPS Attendance id

schema.description: DPS Attendance id

put.description: A manual method for synchronising a DPS Allocation to Nomis (whether new or not - performs an upsert). Performs in the same way as the automated message based solution - intended for use as a workaround when things go wrong. Requires role PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

parameters.name: allocationId
parameters.description: DPS Allocation id

schema.description: DPS Allocation id

put.description: A manual method for synchronising an existing DPS Activity to Nomis. Performs in the same way as the automated message based solution - intended for use as a workaround when things go wrong. Requires role PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

parameters.name: activityScheduleId
parameters.description: DPS Activity id

schema.description: DPS Activity id

post.description: A manual method for synchronising a new DPS Activity to Nomis. Performs in the same way as the automated message based solution - intended for use as a workaround when things go wrong. Requires role PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

parameters.name: activityScheduleId
parameters.description: DPS Activity id

schema.description: DPS Activity id

post.summary: Resynchronises adjudication for the given charge from DPS back to NOMIS
post.description: Used when an adjudication in NOMIS has been deleted, so emergency use only. If any element fails run individual repair endpoints for hearings etc assuming adjudication create did succeed. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

post.summary: Resynchronises punishments for the given adjudication from DPS back to NOMIS
post.description: Used when a domain event adjudication.punishments.updated has gone missing, so emergency use only. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

post.summary: Resynchronises a hearing for the given adjudication from DPS back to NOMIS
post.description: Used when a hearing has been deleted in NOMIS due to linked charges, so emergency use only. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

post.summary: Resynchronises an outcome for the given adjudication from DPS back to NOMIS
post.description: Used when one of the numerous outcome upsert domain events, calling adjudicationsService.upsertOutcome(message.fromJson()) from the listener have gone missing, so emergency use only. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

post.summary: Resynchronises a DPS visit balance to NOMIS
post.description: Used when an unexpected event has happened in DPS that has resulted in the NOMIS data drifting from DPS, so emergency use only. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

post.summary: Resynchronises a csip report inserted from DPS to NOMIS
post.description: Used when DPS is in the correct state but NOMIS is wrong, so emergency use only. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

parameters.name: clearChildMappings
parameters.description: Whether to clear existing child mappings

schema.description: Whether to clear existing child mappings

post.summary: Resynchronises the DPS visit to NOMIS
post.description: Used when an unexpected event has happened in DPS that has resulted in the NOMIS visit not being present, so emergency use only. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

post.summary: Resynchronises an adjustments for the given prisoner from DPS back to NOMIS
post.description: Used when DPS is in the correct state but NOMIS is wrong, so emergency use only. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

parameters.name: force-status
parameters.description: Whether status of the DPS should be propagated to NOMIS

schema.description: Whether status of the DPS should be propagated to NOMIS

parameters.name: set-active
parameters.description: Whether status of the NOMIS adjustment should be set to true

schema.description: Whether status of the NOMIS adjustment should be set to true

post.summary: Clones a case to latest booking
post.description: Used when cases need cloning to latest booking which failed previously, so emergency use only. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

post.summary: Resynchronises a court case from DPS to NOMIS
post.description: Used when a single case needs resynchronising to NOMIS which failed previously, so emergency use only. Only cases without sentences are currently supported. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

parameters.name: courtCaseId
parameters.description: The ID of the court case to be re-synced to NOMIS. For convenience this can either be the DPS court case ID or the NOMIS court case ID.

schema.description: The ID of the court case to be re-synced to NOMIS. For convenience this can either be the DPS court case ID or the NOMIS court case ID.

404.description: Either no mapping found for case or case not found for prisoner

409.description: Unable to repair a case which is already sentenced

post.summary: Resynchronises current alerts for the given prisoner from DPS back to current booking in NOMIS
post.description: Used when an unexpected event has happened in DPS that has resulted in the NOMIS data drifting from DPS, so emergency use only. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

post.summary: Creates contact aka person data from DPS back to NOMIS. This will create the contact and any support child entities including the prisoner relationship that are created in DPS create contact flow. Currently only supports creating a contact without restrictions. When mapping already exists for entity or child no update will be applied
post.description: Used when an unexpected event has happened in DPS, for instance no domain events published after create contact that has resulted in the NOMIS data drifting from DPS, so emergency use only. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__SYNCHRONISATION__RW

get.summary: Run the reconciliation for this prison number
get.description:
Retrieves the differences for a prisoner. Empty response returned if no differences found. 
      Requires PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

parameters.name: prisonNumber
parameters.description: Prison number aka noms id / offender id display

schema.description: Prison number aka noms id / offender id display

403.description: Forbidden to access this endpoint. Requires PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

get.summary: Run the prisoner transaction reconciliation for this transaction id
get.description:
Retrieves the prisoner transaction differences for a transaction. 
      Empty response returned if no differences found.
      Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: Transaction Id

schema.description: Transaction Id

403.description: Forbidden to access this endpoint. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

get.summary: Run the prisoner balance reconciliation for this prisoner
get.description:
Retrieves the account balance differences for a prisoner. A null response returned if no differences found. 
      Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

parameters.name: offenderNo
parameters.description: Prisoner's offenderNo

schema.description: Prisoner's offenderNo

get.summary: Run the prisoner balance reconciliation for one prison
get.description:
Retrieves the account balance differences for all prisoners who have balances for the given prison (not prisoners necessarily in that prison).
      A null response returned if no differences found. 
      Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

parameters.name: prisonId
parameters.description: Prison Id

schema.description: Prison Id

get.summary: Run the prisoner balance reconciliation for this prisoner
get.description:
Retrieves the account balance differences for a prisoner. A null response returned if no differences found. 
      Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

parameters.name: rootOffenderId
parameters.description: Prisoner's rootOffenderId

schema.description: Prisoner's rootOffenderId

parameters.name: staffId
parameters.description: staff Id

schema.description: staff Id

get.summary: Run the prison (GL) transaction reconciliation for this prison id
get.description:
Retrieves the prison (GL) transaction differences for a prison on the specified date, or today if no date is provided.
       It does not reconcile prison (GL) transactions that form part of an offender transaction.
       An empty response returned if no differences are found.
       Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

parameters.name: prisonId
parameters.description: Prison Id

schema.description: Prison Id

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date for prison reconcile

schema.description: Date for prison reconcile

403.description: Forbidden to access this endpoint. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

get.summary: Run the prison (GL) transaction reconciliation for this transaction id
get.description:
Retrieves the GL transaction differences for a transaction. Empty response returned if no differences found.
      Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: Transaction Id

schema.description: Transaction Id

403.description: Forbidden to access this endpoint. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

404.description: Prison (GL) Transaction Id does not exist.

get.description:
Retrieves the account balance differences for a prison. Empty response returned if no differences found.

parameters.name: prisonId

delete.summary: Resynchronises a delete hearing result for the given adjudication from DPS back to NOMIS
delete.description: Used when a domain event adjudication.hearingCompleted.deleted has gone missing, so emergency use only. Requires ROLE_PRISONER_TO_NOMIS__UPDATE__RW

nomisCaseId.description: The new NOMIS court case ID

startDateTime.description: The start time of the visit

endDateTime.description: The end time of the visit
